classificationPrinciple: Classify by function, delivery, data, risk, value role, ecosystem layer, user route, and execution surface. One provider may belong to multiple swarms.

swarms.name: Identity / # Swarm
swarms.purpose: identity, authentication, credentials, profiles, signatures and entity resolution

swarms.name: SEAL Swarm
swarms.purpose: consent, permission, authority, policy and protected execution boundaries

swarms.name: Root Swarm
swarms.purpose: formation history, provenance, origin, deep records and continuity

swarms.name: Index Swarm
swarms.purpose: classification, retrieval, search, knowledge organization and situational intelligence

swarms.name: ATLAS Swarm
swarms.purpose: mapping, discovery, public visibility, directories and ecosystem navigation

swarms.name: Vault Swarm
swarms.purpose: custody, contracts, sensitive records, protected storage and retention

swarms.name: I/O Value Swarm
swarms.purpose: value resolution, ledger, assets, liabilities, credit, treasury, movement and settlement

swarms.name: ABBA Resolution Swarm
swarms.purpose: orchestration, routing, conflict resolution, assignment and cross-swarm coordination

swarms.name: Actual Swarm
swarms.purpose: user-facing execution, delivery, value reveal and completed outcomes

swarms.name: Continuum Swarm
swarms.purpose: memory, recall, context continuity, temporal graphs and long-term learning

swarms.name: HAPI Swarm
swarms.purpose: human entry, peer interaction, onboarding, support and human-to-human routes

swarms.name: Proof Swarm
swarms.purpose: receipts, attestations, timestamps, verification and evidence chains

swarms.name: PULSE Swarm
swarms.purpose: feedback, telemetry, useful signals, learning return and optimization

swarms.name: Education Swarm
swarms.purpose: learning, tutoring, curriculum, assessment, certification and InstituteGPT delivery

swarms.name: Communication Swarm
swarms.purpose: email, voice, video, messaging, meetings and public communications

swarms.name: Build Swarm
swarms.purpose: software creation, design, code, testing, deployment and release management

swarms.name: Automation Swarm
swarms.purpose: workflows, triggers, jobs, schedulers, agents and process automation

swarms.name: Data Swarm
swarms.purpose: databases, storage, APIs, ingestion, transformation and structured records

swarms.name: Security Swarm
swarms.purpose: security scanning, threat detection, access control, secrets and incident response

swarms.name: Governance Swarm
swarms.purpose: policy, roles, mandates, compliance, audit and institutional control

swarms.name: Research Swarm
swarms.purpose: discovery, analysis, forecasting, experiments and intelligence gathering

swarms.name: Finance Swarm
swarms.purpose: banking, accounting, payments, lending, Islamic finance and financial operations

swarms.name: Commerce Swarm
swarms.purpose: sales, CRM, marketplace, procurement, subscriptions and monetization

swarms.name: Operations Swarm
swarms.purpose: projects, tasks, workforce, service operations and organizational execution

swarms.name: Media Swarm
swarms.purpose: design, images, video, audio, presentations and publishing

swarms.name: Hardware / Physical Swarm
swarms.purpose: devices, robotics, sensors, vehicles, drones, IoT and physical execution

swarms.name: Legal Swarm
swarms.purpose: contracts, legal research, disputes, compliance and lawful execution

swarms.name: Health Swarm
swarms.purpose: health records, wellness, care coordination, risk and support

swarms.name: Government Swarm
swarms.purpose: public administration, citizen services, elections and institutional coordination
